info.title: PAFS Backend API
info.description:
## Project Application and Funding Service - Backend API

RESTful API for managing Flood and Coastal Erosion Risk Management (FCRM) projects on behalf of Regional Management Authorities (RMAs) and the Environment Agency.

---

### Authentication

Two authentication mechanisms are supported:

| Mechanism | Header | Format | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| **JWT Bearer** | `Authorization` | `Bearer <accessToken>` | All authenticated user routes |

Obtain a JWT access token via `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.  
Refresh an expired access token via `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`.

---

### Role-Based Access

- **Public** - No authentication required.
- **Authenticated** - Valid JWT Bearer token required.
- **Admin only** - Valid JWT from an account with `admin: true`.
- **Service** - Valid JWT Bearer token.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Service health and readiness checks. These endpoints are **public** and require no authentication.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication, session management, and password operations. Includes login, logout, token refresh, forgot/reset password, and invitation set-password flow.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: User account creation, retrieval, update, and administration. Includes account approval, reactivation, and invitation management. Most endpoints require JWT. Create (without ID) supports optional JWT.

tags.name: Areas
tags.description: Geographic area management for EA Areas, PSO Areas, RMAs, and Authorities. `GET /areas-by-type` is public; all other endpoints require JWT.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: FCRM project proposal management: create, retrieve, update status, validate names, and manage benefit area shapefiles. All endpoints require JWT (update-status also accepts API Key).

tags.name: File Uploads
tags.description: File upload session management via CDP Uploader service for benefit area shapefiles. JWT is optional.

tags.name: Email
tags.description: Email address validation utilities. Public endpoint.

tags.name: Scheduler
tags.description: Distributed scheduler task management. All endpoints require JWT with `admin: true`.

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from `POST /api/v1/auth/login`. Expires after 15 minutes by default.

ReferenceNumber.name: referenceNumber
ReferenceNumber.description: Project reference number. Forward slashes (`/`) should be replaced with hyphens (`-`) in the URL path. E.g. `2425/YNEJ/01/01` becomes `2425-YNEJ-01-01`.

field.description: Field that caused the error (validation errors)

warningCode.description: Optional warning code (e.g. approaching account lock)

refreshToken.description: Valid refresh token obtained from login or previous refresh

email.description: Email address of the account to reset. Always returns 200 regardless of whether the address exists (anti-enumeration).

areaId.description: ID of the area to assign

primary.description: Whether this is the user's primary area

UpsertAccountRequest.description: Create (no `id`) or update (with `id`) a user account. Admin-only fields: `id`, `admin`. Non-admin accounts require `responsibility`, `jobTitle`, `organisation`, `telephoneNumber`, and `areas`.

id.description: If provided, performs an update. Requires admin JWT.

admin.description: Grant admin privileges. Requires admin JWT.

isAdminContext.description: Set to true when an admin is creating/editing another user to relax field requirements

UpsertAreaRequest.description: Create (no `id`) or update (with `id`) an area. Admin only. EA Area type cannot be created or updated via this endpoint.

areaType.description: EA Area cannot be created/updated via this endpoint

identifier.description: Authority Code (for Authority) or Identifier Code (for RMA)

parentId.description: EA Area ID (for PSO) or PSO ID (for RMA)

subType.description: RFCC Code (for PSO) or Authority Code (for RMA)

ProjectDetail.description: Full project proposal data. Fields vary based on what has been saved.

UpsertProjectRequest.description: The `payload` schema varies by `level`. Each `level` validates only the fields relevant to that save step. Always include `referenceNumber` in `payload` for updates (omit for initial create).

level.description: Validation level key — determines which fields in `payload` are validated.

payload.description: The project data to save. Required fields depend on the `level` value. Always include `referenceNumber` for updates.

referenceNumber.description: Omit on initial create; required on all subsequent updates

name.description: Project name to check for uniqueness

referenceNumber.description: Reference number of the current project (to exclude it from duplicate check)

downloadUrl.description: Presigned S3 URL valid for 7 days

entityType.description: Type of entity the upload belongs to (e.g. proposal)

entityId.description: ID of the entity the upload belongs to

reference.description: Business reference (e.g. project reference number with hyphens)

metadata.description: Custom metadata to attach to the upload session

downloadUrls.description: If provided, CDP Uploader will download from these URLs instead of accepting a file upload. Sets initial status to PROCESSING.

uploadId.description: Unique upload session ID for polling status

uploadUrl.description: CDP Uploader URL to POST the file to

checkDisposable.description: Check if email is from a disposable domain

checkDnsMx.description: Check DNS MX records for the email domain

checkDuplicate.description: Check if email is already registered

excludeUserId.description: Exclude this user ID from duplicate check (for updates)

taskName.description: Name of the registered scheduled task to trigger manually

ForbiddenError.description: Authenticated but not authorised (e.g. non-admin accessing admin route)

ValidationError.description: Request payload or parameter validation failed

errors.message: must be a valid email address

get.description: Returns overall service health status without individual check details. Suitable for load balancer health checks.
Returns health status with individual checks for each backing service (PostgreSQL, GOV.UK Notify).

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns JWT access token and refresh token on success. Returns `401` with error codes on failure (invalid credentials, account locked, account disabled).

account_locked.summary: Account locked after too many failed attempts

post.description: Invalidates the current JWT session. The user's `unique_session_id` is rotated, making the current access token and refresh token immediately invalid.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token pair. The old refresh token is invalidated (token rotation).

get.description: Lightweight endpoint to verify that the JWT token is valid and the session is still active. Used by frontend to check authentication state.

post.summary: Validate a reset or invitation token
post.description: Checks whether a password-reset or account-invitation token is valid and has not expired. Returns the associated email address on success.
Sends a password reset email to the given address if an active account exists. **Always returns 200** regardless of whether the email address is registered (anti-enumeration measure).

200.description: Request received (email sent if account exists)

post.description: Validates the password reset token and sets the new password. The token is invalidated after use. Requires `token` + `password` + `confirmPassword`.

400.description: Token invalid/expired or passwords do not match

post.summary: Set initial password via invitation token
post.description: Used in the account invitation flow. Validates the invitation token, sets the user's initial password, and marks the invitation as accepted. The token is invalidated after use.

400.description: Token invalid/expired or passwords do not match

get.description: Returns a paginated list of user accounts. Supports filtering by status, area, and free-text search. Requires JWT.

parameters.name: areaId
parameters.description: Filter accounts assigned to this area ID

post.description: Creates a new user account (no `id` in payload) or updates an existing one (`id` required, admin JWT required). New accounts are auto-approved if the email domain matches the configured auto-approve list, otherwise left pending for admin approval. Admin accounts (`admin: true`) always require an admin JWT.

get.description: Returns full account details including area assignments. Requires JWT.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user account. **Admin only.** Works on both pending and active accounts.

patch.description: Approves a pending account and sends the user a password-set invitation email via GOV.UK Notify. **Admin only.**

200.description: Account approved and invitation email sent

patch.description: Reactivates a disabled account and sends a reactivation notification email. **Admin only.**

post.description: Generates a new invitation token and resends the password-set invitation email. Only valid for approved accounts that have not yet set their password. **Admin only.**

get.summary: Get all areas grouped by type
get.description: Returns all areas from the database grouped by their `areaType`. **Public endpoint — no authentication required.**

get.summary: List areas with filtering and pagination
get.description: Returns a paginated list of areas, optionally filtered by search term and/or area type. Requires JWT.
Returns area details for the specified ID. **Admin only.** Country and EA Area types are excluded from results.

post.description:
Creates a new area (no `id`) or updates an existing one (`id` required). **Admin only.** EA Area type cannot be created or updated. Supported types: `authority`, `pso_area`, `rma`. Each type has specific required fields:
- **Authority**: `identifier` (Authority Code), `name`
- **PSO Area**: `name`, `parentId` (EA Area ID), `subType` (RFCC Code)
- **RMA**: `name`, `identifier` (Identifier Code), `parentId` (PSO ID), `subType` (Authority Code)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of FCRM project proposals. **Role-filtered**: non-admin users only see projects for their assigned areas. Admins can optionally filter by a specific `areaId`.

parameters.name: areaId
parameters.description: Filter by area ID. Admins only — non-admin users are restricted to their assigned areas.

get.description: Returns the full project proposal data for the given reference number. Replace forward slashes with hyphens in the URL (e.g. `2425/YNEJ/01/01` → `2425-YNEJ-01-01`).

post.description:
Creates a new project (no `referenceNumber` in `payload`) or updates an existing one. The `level` field controls which fields in `payload` are validated.

**Create:** Only RMA users with access to the specified `areaId` can create projects.

**Update:** Admin users, RMA users with access to the project area, or users with access to the parent PSO area can update.

Save is performed field-by-field as the user progresses through the proposal form — each `level` corresponds to a form step.

put.description: Updates the status of an existing project. Accepts either a JWT Bearer token — designed for service-to-service calls from the frontend or workflow engine.

post.summary: Check if project name is unique
post.description: Checks whether a project name already exists in the system. Pass `referenceNumber` to exclude the current project from the duplicate check (used during edits).

get.summary: Get benefit area file download URL
get.description: Regenerates a presigned S3 download URL for the project's benefit area shapefile (ZIP containing .dbf, .shx, .shp, .prj files). The URL is valid for 7 days and is also persisted to the project record.

404.description: Project not found or no benefit area file attached

delete.description: Deletes the benefit area shapefile from S3 and clears the associated file metadata from the project record.

404.description: Project not found or no file to delete

post.description: Creates a new upload session with the CDP Uploader service and records it in the database. Returns a `uploadId` for status polling and an `uploadUrl` to POST the file to. If `downloadUrls` are provided, CDP Uploader downloads from those URLs instead of accepting a direct file POST (status begins as `processing`).

get.description: Returns the current status of a file upload session. On each call, if the status is `pending`, it syncs with the CDP Uploader service. If the upload reaches `ready` status, it also triggers host-application validation (ZIP content check) and updates the associated project's benefit area file metadata.

data.rejectionReason: Required shapefile components missing from ZIP

post.description: Validates an email address against configurable checks: disposable domain detection, DNS MX record verification, and duplicate account check. All checks are optional and enabled per request. **Public endpoint — no authentication required.**

400.description: Email failed one or more validation checks

get.description: Returns the status of all registered scheduled tasks including their cron schedule, last run time, and next scheduled run. **Admin only.**
Returns aggregate execution statistics and the most recent execution log entry for a named scheduled task. **Admin only.**
Returns execution log entries for scheduled tasks with optional filtering. **Admin only.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of log entries to return (max 500)

post.description: Immediately executes a named scheduled task outside of its normal schedule. Uses distributed locking to prevent concurrent executions. **Admin only.**

400.description: Task not found or already running
